collections.title: All
Back To School
collections.description: Kick off school season with our Back To School Collection: trendy press-on nail sets featuring cheerful, classroom-ready designs. Each set combines playful vibes with press-and-go convenience—making your first-day look effortless and on-trend.

collections.title: Back to School Picks
collections.description:
Elevate your first-day look with Ersa Nails’ Back to School Picks—a curated selection of chic press-on nails designed to blend fashion, convenience, and classroom confidence. Featuring timeless nude French tips, soft florals, and vibrant accents, these sets offer effortless application and polished durability—without the salon hassle.

Whether you're a student prepping for style or a teacher setting the trend, Ersa’s school-season designs pair wearable elegance with vibrant personality. Enjoy looks that last up to four weeks—perfect for making a great first impression at every desk and hallway walk.

collections.title: Baroque
collections.description: Step into the world of opulence with the Baroque Collection, where intricate craftsmanship meets divine elegance. Featuring heavy embellishments, luxurious detailing, and religious-inspired motifs, this collection embodies grandeur and sophistication. Each set is a testament to timeless beauty, offering a bold yet refined aesthetic for those who appreciate ornate designs and a touch of spiritual elegance. Perfect for making a statement, the Baroque Collection is designed for those who want their nails to reflect an air of majestic allure.

collections.title: Best of the Best
collections.description: Best of the Best — Ersa Nails’ most-loved press-on nails of the year. Handcrafted, reusable nail sets that delivered salon-level looks again and again. These are the styles everyone kept coming back for.

collections.title: Best Sellers
collections.description: Discover our best sellers, our best-selling series that showcases our most popular designs.

collections.title: Bloom For Yourself
collections.description: Bloom For Yourself by Ersa Nails is a spring-inspired collection of handcrafted press on nails designed to celebrate softness, growth, and self-expression. Featuring delicate florals, butterflies, and nature-inspired details, each set brings a fresh, feminine touch to your everyday look. These reusable nails are easy to apply, long-lasting, and made for effortless beauty without the salon. Discover salon-quality press on nails that let you bloom in your own way, season after season.

collections.title: Bloom For Yourself (copy)
collections.description: Bloom For Yourself by Ersa Nails is a spring-inspired collection of handcrafted press on nails designed to celebrate softness, growth, and self-expression. Featuring delicate florals, butterflies, and nature-inspired details, each set brings a fresh, feminine touch to your everyday look. These reusable nails are easy to apply, long-lasting, and made for effortless beauty without the salon. Discover salon-quality press on nails that let you bloom in your own way, season after season.

collections.title: Bridal Collection
collections.description:
Introducing Ersa Nails' Bridal Collection, a stunning array of Press-on Nails designed to complement the beauty and elegance of every bride. Each set in this collection is meticulously crafted to capture the essence of romance, sophistication, and timeless charm, making it the perfect accessory for your special day.

From classic French tips adorned with delicate pearls to shimmering designs embellished with Swarovski crystals, our Bridal Collection offers a variety of styles to suit every bridal aesthetic. Whether you prefer a subtle and understated look or crave a touch of glamour and sparkle, you'll find the perfect nails to complete your bridal ensemble.

Elevate your bridal look with Ersa Nails' Bridal Collection and let your nails shine as brightly as your love story.

collections.title: BUNDLES
collections.description: Discover the perfect blend of style and savings with Ersa Nails' Bundles. Each bundle is thoughtfully curated to include a variety of press-on nails that cater to different tastes and design preferences. Whether you're looking for chic minimalism, bold patterns, or elegant florals, our bundles offer a comprehensive selection to match your unique style. Not only do you get a range of stunning press-on nails, but you also enjoy significant savings compared to purchasing individually. Explore our bundles and find the ideal press-on nail designs to express your personality at an unbeatable value.

collections.title: Classy Nails
collections.description: Introducing Ersa's Classy Nails – where timeless elegance meets modern simplicity. Each piece in this collection embodies the essence of minimalist sophistication, perfect for those who appreciate the beauty of understated design. Whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or adding a touch of refinement to your everyday look, the Classy Nails offer versatile options that seamlessly blend with any style. Discover the allure of simplicity with our carefully curated selection of classic, chic nails.

collections.title: Coachella Nails/Best
collections.description: Our Best-Selling Coachella Press On Nails by Ersa Nails are the ultimate festival accessory you need this season. Featuring a stunning mix of bold colors, intricate patterns, and dazzling rhinestone accents, these nails are designed to turn heads and add an edgy touch to any outfit. Crafted by Ersa Nails for effortless application, these reusable press-ons offer long-lasting wear, so you can dance, vibe, and shine all day (and night) long. Whether you're heading to Coachella or just want to channel those festival vibes, these nails bring that perfect blend of glamour and free-spirited style.

collections.title: Coachella Nails/New
collections.description: Get ready to shine this festival season with our Coachella-inspired Press On Nails. Designed to complement your wildest festival looks, these nails feature vibrant, eye-catching colors, intricate designs, and bold embellishments that will elevate your style in an instant. From geometric patterns to sparkling rhinestones, every set captures the essence of desert vibes and free-spirited fashion. Easy to apply and reusable, these nails offer salon-quality results without the hassle. Perfect for making a statement at Coachella and beyond — because your nails deserve to be just as dazzling as your festival outfits.

collections.title: Creepy Carnival
collections.description: This Halloween, Ersa Nails brings you back to the playful magic of childhood with the Creepy Carnival Collection. Think of mischievous little ghosts, candy-colored pumpkins, and cartoonish details that feel both spooky and sweet. Each design captures that carefree, wide-eyed wonder of trick-or-treat nights at the carnival—fun, innocent, and full of imagination. It’s not just nails, it’s your ticket back to the joy of being a kid again.

collections.title: Cyber Week
Dragon Collection
collections.description: Celebrate the Year of the Dragon with Ersa Nails' Dragon Collection, a tribute to Chinese heritage and artistry. Inspired by iconic Chinese elements such as dragons, bamboo, ink wash paintings, and porcelain, this collection embodies elegance and cultural richness. Each press-on nail in this collection is meticulously handcrafted, showcasing exquisite designs and intricate details. Embrace the allure of traditional Chinese art with our premium press-on nails, and let your nails become a canvas for these timeless, beautifully crafted designs. Discover the Dragon Collection and adorn your fingertips with the grace and power of Chinese culture.

collections.title: Ersa Birthday
collections.description: Celebrate with us! 🎉 We're marking a special milestone with a collection full of vibrant, festive designs perfect for any birthday celebration. From sparkling accents to playful patterns, each set of press-on nails captures the joy and excitement of this moment. Treat yourself to stunning nails while enjoying exclusive anniversary promotions! Don’t miss out—this collection is only available for a limited time!

collections.description: Cyber Week is here! Up to 50% off! Get a head start on your holiday shopping with exclusive offers and exciting surprises. Shop limited-time bundles, seasonal favorites, and much more — all at unbeatable prices. Don’t miss out on this early access to the best deals of the season!

collections.title: Ersa Essence
collections.description: Ersa Essence is a timeless press-on nails collection that celebrates effortless elegance. With minimal, versatile designs crafted to complement all skin tones, these nails are your go-to for everyday sophistication — simple, polished, and always in style.

collections.title: Ersa Valentine Sale
collections.description: Shop Ersa Nails’ Valentine Sale and enjoy up to 50% off our exclusive collection. Don’t miss these limited-time deals!

collections.title: Ersa x Work Piece
collections.description: Celebrate the beauty of nature with the Ersa Nails x Work Piece Collection, a collaboration that brings together the elegance of press-on nails and botanical-inspired jewelry. Featuring lush green tones and delicate floral accents, this collection mirrors Work Piece’s signature rings, earrings, and necklaces adorned with flowers and greenery. Designed for spring and summer, each set captures a fresh, effortless charm—perfect for those who love a touch of nature at their fingertips.

collections.title: flash sale
collections.description: Enjoy daily flash sales on four exclusive Ersa Nails nail sets. Don’t miss out!

collections.title: Flower Nails
collections.description: Step into a world of floral fantasy with the Flower Nails by Ersa Nails. Each design in this collection is adorned with delicate and enchanting flower embellishments, capturing the essence of dreamlike beauty and sweet charm. Perfect for those who adore a touch of whimsy, these nails bring a playful yet elegant vibe to your fingertips. Embrace the magic of blooming flowers and let your nails blossom with the sweet, captivating allure of the Flower Nails.

collections.title: Golden Glamour
collections.description:
Dive into the opulent and sacred allure of the Golden Glamour, an era that reshaped the world of art and spirituality. Ersa Nails proudly presents the Golden Glamour Collection, a series of press-on nail designs that encapsulate the revered catholic and Virgencita styles, harmoniously blended with the brand's commitment to unique, statement-making beauty.
This collection is more than an array of nails; it is an ode to the awe-inspiring artistic movements of the past. With each set, experience the intricate details of cross motifs, the delicate beauty of religious iconography, and the rich tapestry of an epoch known for its unparalleled devotion to the divine and the majestic.
The Golden Glamour Collection from Ersa Nails transcends simple aesthetics to imbue your fingertips with a touch of history's most artistically vibrant period. It honors the timeless catholic symbols and the artistic reverence for sacred stories, bringing them into the contemporary realm of fashion and personal expression. Each nail is a canvas, showcasing the splendor of the Renaissance era with a touch of modern elegance, inviting you to wear a piece of art that tells a story of faith, artistry, and cultural splendor.
Join us in this homage to the past with Ersa Nails' Golden Glamour Collection—a limited series where every design is a prayer, every color a hymn, and every nail a celebration of the spiritual journey that continues to illuminate the world of beauty and grace.

collections.title: Halloween
collections.description: Introducing the Witching Hour Collection from Ersa Nails, a captivating selection that embraces the allure of the dark and gothic aesthetic. Inspired by the enigmatic world of dark witches, this collection features designs that evoke a sense of mystery and intrigue, with blood-inspired elements that add a daring touch. Each set captures the essence of the supernatural, perfect for those who dare to express their bold side. Step into the shadows with the Witching Hour Collection, where every nail tells a hauntingly beautiful story.

collections.title: Heirloom Reverie copy
collections.description:
The Heirloom Reverie collection is inspired by the treasures of the Palace Museum in Beijing, incorporating traditional Chinese crafts like Cloisonné enamel, inlay work, feather inlay, gold-inlaid jade, and porcelain. These ancient techniques, once reserved for royalty, are reinterpreted into wearable art, celebrating the beauty and cultural significance of China’s craftsmanship.

Designed and crafted by our co-founder Valentina, each set of nails is not just an artwork, but a tribute to the Palace Museum's treasures. This collection brings the timeless elegance of Chinese traditions into modern, wearable form, honoring the craftsmanship of the past.

collections.title: Holiday
collections.description: Step into the festive season with Ersa Nails! Each set of press-on nails is designed to capture the magic of celebration — from shimmering metallics to elegant winter tones. Perfect for parties, gatherings, or cozy nights in, these nails let you shine effortlessly and stay flawless all season long.

collections.title: LNY 2026
collections.description:
The LNY 2026 collection is inspired by the treasures of the Palace Museum in Beijing, incorporating traditional Chinese crafts like Cloisonné enamel, inlay work, feather inlay, gold-inlaid jade, and porcelain. These ancient techniques, once reserved for royalty, are reinterpreted into wearable art, celebrating the beauty and cultural significance of China’s craftsmanship.

Designed and crafted by our co-founder Valentina, each set of nails is not just an artwork, but a tribute to the Palace Museum's treasures. This collection brings the timeless elegance of Chinese traditions into modern, wearable form, honoring the craftsmanship of the past.

collections.title: Lost Atlantis
collections.description:
Dive into the mystique of Ersa Nails' Lost Atlantis, where the enchantment of the ocean and the allure of mermaids come to life. This collection is inspired by the legendary lost city of Atlantis, reflecting the beauty and mystery of the deep sea. Each set of press-on nails in the Lost Atlantis features oceanic elements and mermaid-inspired designs, capturing the essence of underwater elegance and magic.

Our Lost Atlantis not only celebrates the splendor of the ocean but also emphasizes the importance of marine conservation and environmental protection. By wearing these press-on nails, you're not just making a style statement—you're also supporting a vital cause. Perfect for those who are passionate about the sea and committed to its preservation, our press-on nails offer a stunning and effortless way to express your love for the ocean.

Join us in our mission to protect the marine environment while adorning your nails with the ethereal beauty of the Lost Atlantis. Let your nails be a testament to the wonder of the ocean and the importance of preserving its natural treasures.

collections.description: Celebrate love with Ersa Nails' Valentine’s Bundles! Enjoy up to 30% off on our stunning handmade press-on nails, designed for effortless elegance and reusability. Perfect for you or your special someone, these reusable nails bring both beauty and sustainability to your V-Day look!

Each set captures the essence of renewal, prosperity, and good fortune, making it the perfect way to ring in the new year with style. Whether you're celebrating with family or enjoying festive moments, Ersa Nails' Lunar New Year Collection brings timeless elegance and cultural significance to your nails, all while offering the convenience and durability of our signature reusable press-on nails.

Wear them for date night, girls’ night, or just because you deserve something pretty. Love yourself a little extra this Valentine’s.

collections.title: Valentine's Collection
collections.description: Celebrate love and romance with Ersa Nails' Valentine Collection, inspired by the enchanting spirit of Valentine's Day. This collection features press-on nails that capture the essence of love with designs full of hearts, roses, and delicate hues of pink and red. Each set is meticulously crafted to add a touch of romance to your look, making every moment with your loved one even more special. Elevate your Valentine's Day celebrations with our premium press-on nails, designed to express the warmth and sweetness of love. Discover the Valentine Collection and adorn your nails with the perfect symbol of your affection.

collections.title: Wonderfall
collections.description: Step into the season of transformation with the Wonderfall Collection by Ersa Nails. This exclusive fall series reimagines timeless autumn hues through meticulously handcrafted press-on nails, blending rich colors and intricate designs that capture the essence of fall.

collections.title: Year of the Snake
collections.description:
Celebrate the Lunar New Year in style with The Year of the Snake collection, a limited edition set of 16 exclusive designs that draw inspiration from the rich heritage of Asian culture. Each design embodies the essence of the Year of the Snake, featuring intricate snake motifs, blue and white porcelain patterns, and the delicate artistry of Miao Jiang embroidery.

This collection symbolizes transformation, strength, and timeless beauty—ideal for embracing new beginnings in the New Year. With its harmonious blend of traditional elements and modern elegance, these press-on nails offer a refined way to honor the season and infuse your look with cultural significance. Perfect for those who seek a statement of grace and power as they welcome the Year of the Snake.

collections.title: Zodiac
collections.description: Explore the celestial beauty of the Zodiac Collection from Ersa Nails, inspired by the twelve astrological signs. Each press-on nail design in this collection is intricately crafted with elements that reflect the unique traits and symbols of the zodiac, featuring stunning celestial patterns and starry motifs. Whether you identify with the fiery passion of Aries, the grounded stability of Taurus, or the ethereal nature of Pisces, our Zodiac Collection offers a personalized touch to your manicure. Discover the perfect press-on nails that align with your astrological sign and let your fingertips shine with the cosmic charm of the stars.
